subcodes.first_line: O my youthful one! Though aged in body, yet with a soul young and vibrant, thou art as a cypress in the stream of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوجوان من هر چند بتن سالخورده ولی بجان نوجوان زنده دل در جویبار هدایت سرو
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
